title: Wordless Wednesday: Shark Week
excerpt: Sorry I’ve been MIA the last couple weeks! I needed a little blogging break to start out the Summer- hope you didn’t miss me too much. 😉 It’s Shark Week on the Discovery Channel, so I had to share a few pics of the sharks we saw at the National Aquarium!
content:
Sorry I’ve been MIA the last couple weeks! I needed a little blogging break to start out the Summer- hope you didn’t miss me too much. 😉 It’s Shark Week on the Discovery Channel, so I had to share a few pics of the sharks we saw at the National Aquarium!

We went to Baltimore for the Husband’s birthday a few weeks ago because he really loves aquariums! We had a fabulous time and took a ton of photos of fishies, so I’ll probably do a recap post (albeit a late one!) soon. For now, enjoy these scary looking sharks! They don’t look hungry or anything, right? 🙂

Are you watching Shark Week this week?
